---
title: "Data Preparation"
subtitle: "Methodology · Part 1"
author: "Team HeeHaa"
date: last-modified
---

> *(placeholder)* This page documents how the raw VAST Challenge 2026 MC1 data was
> imported, cleaned and reshaped into the form used by the rest of the analysis.

## Overview

_Briefly describe the source files and the goal of the preparation step._

## Loading the data

```{r}
#| label: load-data
#| eval: false

# TODO: replace with your actual data loading code
library(tidyverse)
library(jsonlite)

# raw <- fromJSON("data/mc1_graph.json")
```

## Cleaning and transformation

_Describe parsing, type conversion, handling of missing values, and how nodes/edges
(agents, channels, messages, rounds) were extracted._

## Output

_Describe the tidy tables / objects that feed the [Statistical Analysis](stat-analysis.qmd)
and [Data Exploration](data-exploration.qmd) pages._
